name: rag_rerank
use_case: RAG reranking over a retrieved candidate set

corpus.title: QNN SDK root
corpus.text: QNN_SDK_ROOT points to the QAIRT installation root used to locate the runtime libraries.

corpus.title: ADSP path
corpus.text: ADSP_LIBRARY_PATH should include hexagon-v68/unsigned, /usr/lib/rfsa/adsp, and /dsp on Tachyon Particle.

corpus.title: License
corpus.text: The project is licensed under MIT.

queries.text: Which env var points to the QNN SDK root?
What should ADSP_LIBRARY_PATH include on Tachyon Particle?
